emails.subject: Re: Mark Fischer inquiry
emails.body: Re: Mark Fischer inquiry Yes, these are two separate, but identical deals. Thanks for double-checking. Kate Stephanie Piwetz 01/22/2001 02:20 PM

emails.subject: Mark Fischer inquiry
emails.body: Mark Fischer inquiry Kate- Can you verify with Mark that there were two identical trades done on Jan 8, 2001 Enron Sells Southern California Edison 100 mws sp-15 165.00 jan 10-31, 2001 We received an executed confirmation letter from the cp but the deal number is not avaliable (the fax machine cut off the deal number) {just collecting all the confirms for the California situation.} the deal numbers I have located are 492137.01, 492152.01 Just making sure one is not a duplicate. Thanks
